cookie.label: Login Cookie
cookie.description: The Login cookie you grabbed from an existing session, see the documentation.

po_token_server_url.label: PO Token Server URL
po_token_server_url.description:
The URL to the PO Token server. Can be left as default for most people. 

**Note that this does require you to have the 'YT Music PO Token Generator' addon installed!**

manifest.description: Stream songs and podcasts from YouTube Music.
